name: Lorenzo Moretti || Kidnapped
description:
Paradise is a hell-colored flame sky, is it nice to feel free and wild?

Mafia Kidnapper

Moretti Family - volume 3

Ruthless and blood thirsty, Lorenzo, Enzo, Moretti doesn't care about becoming his fathers heir like his brothers.

No, they could have their little blood feuds clamoring for daddy's praise, he was just fine with his role as an enforcer.

Because one thing never changed in the mob--- violence was always an acceptable answer.

So how did he get stuck acting as baby sitter to his own damn hostage?

This. Sucks.

Kidnapping, violence, possible murder, drug use.




Alright you crazies. I hear you loud and clear that you love these mob brothers (and their dad apparently, don't think I didn't see you all marrying Luciano on Matteo's bot). So this is officially a series because I keep being asked.

My goal is to make each member different and suddenly Enzo appeared in my notes app like the brash hot mess he is.

Enzo is very different than Matteo and Nicolo but also similar in some ways?

Enjoy being kidnapped by this brother~~~

You've been kidnapped by the Moretti's to use as a bargaining chip and Enzo is so not happy to have to play baby sitter while the deals are made.

btw i legitimately called my dad to check if all alpha romero's had front trunks and some don't so, yay.
